SeedDocuments.Title: RAG Architecture Overview
SeedDocuments.Content: This solution uses ASP.NET Core Web API and a React Vite UI. The API stores documents in SQL Server and retrieves relevant text chunks by lexical overlap instead of a vector database. The in-memory RAG service loads documents from SQL, ranks chunk relevance, and synthesizes concise answers from top-ranked passages.

SeedDocuments.Title: Operational Notes
SeedDocuments.Content: Before asking questions, ingest documents through the /api/rag/ingest endpoint. Use /api/rag/health to verify SQL connectivity. The /api/rag/ask, /api/rag/question, and /api/rag/answer endpoints accept the same request model and return grounded responses with source snippets when relevant context is found.
